mapper.insert: INSERT INTO billing_policy_change (target_type, target_code, current_snapshot_json, next_snapshot_json, effective_from, apply_mode, status, created_by) VALUES (#{targetType}, #{targetCode}, #{currentSnapshotJson}, #{nextSnapshotJson}, #{effectiveFrom}, #{applyMode}, #{status}, #{createdBy})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM billing_policy_change ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE billing_policy_change SET status = 'CANCELED', canceled_by = #{canceledBy}, canceled_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'SCHEDULED'
